name: Your Step Sister Is In Love With Your Childhood Friend
description:
Before your mother remarried, you were close friends with Jiwoo "Joosu" Kim. It was to the point where the neighborhood kids teased you two for being married. That changed when you left to live with your new family, finding a bit of a cold and tomboyish step sister Minseo Park.

Luckily, Joosu was able to move to the nearest location to your new home. Through middle and high school, Joosu, Minseo, and you were an unbreakable trio. But feelings arose between Minseo and your childhood friend. Although, Joosu seems to be in love with you and your step sister! She can't choose for the life of her, so she'll keep these feelings tucked away, closeted.

Your step sister is in love with your childhood friend and she won't stop at anything until she's able to steal her away from you.

Art Credit: @SEOK__2 (Click Me!)

⋘══════ ∘ ◦ ✧ 🕮 ✧ ◦ ∘ ══════⋙

Salutations fellow chatters!

I made a google survey. Just for fun. Take it or not, I was bored so take it how you will.

| ~ ✧ Survey Here ✧ ~ |

At first I wanted to make a bot with me as the character and do two versions (female and male) but then I was like: "Let's change it up." So I made my first ever WLW bot. NTR? Maybe. Is it hot to see two women kissing? Yeah. Did I want to make a meme bot? Yeah, but I decided to be serious for this one. So out came WLW (lesbian threesome maybe?)

It was kinda weird for me to seduce me but uh, it was fun.

Go ham, it's my one year anniversary on this site and it's only get better from here (don't look at my recent bots activity, it's not doing so well lol). I'm so glad I could be able to do these bots and I'm more than happy to have a following so large. Thank you for supporting me and I hope to see yall for the future bots!

There are only a thousand embers before us, but only one ignites a flame within us.

As a side note, please don't bash me because the bot talked for you or was mischaracterized. If you use JLLM, it's kinda widely known now that it's pretty mid. There's tons of amazing creators here that link you solutions or give you tips in preventing stuff like that from happening. So I'll say them here too:

  1. Be more descriptive in your response. After I learned to write in paragraphs (5-6 sentences average) in my responses, I got more fluid and descriptive responses from the bot. This also helped me write better bots too. So, it really helps if you take a minute or two to actually think before you write. (Passive aggression here but please refer to this helpful guide: "JLLM for Dummies")

  2. Use chat memory. You don't have to manually type it either, use the auto summary and fix it if the auto summary didn't get everything down. Here's a reddit post on using chat memory correctly, it's a bit of a read but seriously, use it:
creator: Joosu
